commit: fix: push-to-talk rapidly toggles recording under X11 auto-repeat (defer synthesized releases) (#1605)
fix: surface download errors during onboarding (#1522)
notes: Hoisted the sonner Toaster in AppInner so that model download errors are visible during onboarding.
Added Windows prerequisites, MAX_PATH fixes, and code-signing bypass instructions to BUILD.md.
Upstream branch merge. No code to port.

commit: feat: add Light / Dark / System appearance selector (#1599)
notes: Ignored. Grain has a highly custom, split-theme architecture via ThemeContext.tsx (allowing dark Quick Panel with light Settings). Upstream's implementation is a global document.documentElement override, which is incompatible with Grain's per-panel toggles.
Bumped version to 0.9.1 in Cargo.toml, tauri.conf.json, and package.json.
